description: Dashboard real data: stats (solved tests, average score, rating position, streak), recent results, working 'View All' link, and properly filtered quick action links for DTM/Maktab/Reyting
steps: Create a new API route at src/app/api/dashboard/stats/route.ts that returns real user stats: (1) totalTests from TestResult count for user, (2) avgScore from TestResult average percentage, (3) rank from rating position (count users with higher total score + 1), (4) streak (count consecutive days with at least one test result, going backwards from today). Use the auth() function and db from @/lib/db.

Update src/app/[locale]/(main)/dashboard/page.tsx to: (1) Fetch real stats from /api/dashboard/stats on mount. (2) Fetch recent results from /api/results (already exists, returns results with test info). (3) Show loading states while fetching. (4) Display the recent results (last 5) with test name, date, and score percentage. (5) Make the 'Barchasi' link go to /tests (which shows all results).

Fix the quick action links in dashboard to properly filter tests: Change '/tests?type=dtm' to '/tests?type=DTM', '/tests?type=school' to '/tests?type=SCHOOL'. These link values must match the category type enum values (DTM, SCHOOL). Also update the tests page (src/app/[locale]/(main)/tests/page.tsx) to read URL search params on load using useSearchParams from 'next/navigation' and set the activeCategory accordingly.

In src/app/[locale]/(main)/tests/page.tsx, add useSearchParams() to read the 'type' query parameter on initial load. Map 'DTM' -> 'dtm', 'SCHOOL' -> 'school', etc. to set the initial activeCategory state. This way when the dashboard links to /tests?type=DTM, the tests page pre-selects the DTM tab.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard shows real count of solved tests from the database
Dashboard shows actual rating position of the user
Dashboard shows streak (consecutive days with test activity)
Dashboard shows last 5 test results with test name, date, and score
Barchasi link navigates to tests page
Clicking 'DTM test yechish' navigates to tests page with DTM filter active
Clicking 'Maktab testi' navigates to tests page with SCHOOL filter active
npm run build succeeds without errors
verification: Run npm run build and confirm no TypeScript errors
